videos.headline: Haynes King finds the end zone for 2-yard TD
videos.description: Haynes King fakes the handoff and finds his way into the end zone to put Georgia Tech on the board.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Haynes King finds the end zone for 2-yard TD) 2025/10/11 ESHEET
